message:
refactor(lab): DPOR explorer coverage metrics, oracle formatting, and doc comments

Improve the lab exploration and oracle subsystems across three areas:

1. src/lab/explorer.rs — Wire sleep set optimization and HB-race
   detection into DporExplorer: track total_hb_races, sleep_pruned
   count, per_run_estimated_classes trend, and sleep_set state across
   exploration runs. Early-return class estimate of 1 for empty traces.
   Extend DporCoverageMetrics with new fields (total_hb_races,
   sleep_pruned, estimated_class_trend) for richer coverage reporting.

2. src/lab/oracle/eprocess.rs — Fix clippy lints: replace mutable
   config field mutation in tests with struct update syntax
   (EProcessConfig { field: val, ..default() }), fix integer type
   annotations (u32 for counters), use f64::from() instead of bare
   as-casts for PRNG conversion, use underscore separators in large
   numeric literals, expand multi-line format strings for readability.

3. src/lab/oracle/evidence.rs — Fix usize-to-f64 cast precision by
   clamping through u32 via .min(u32::MAX as usize), use format
   string interpolation (format!("BF = {p_h1:.6} / {p_h0:.6}")).

4. src/lab/oracle/mod.rs — Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on
   report() method.

5. src/lab/meta/runner.rs — Add doc comments to all public types and
   methods in the meta mutation testing framework (MetaResult,
   MetaCoverageEntry, MetaCoverageReport, MetaReport, MetaRunner).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
